en: You know, what's her name? Has an orgasm every time you take her out for a cup of coffee.
You see, the point about Miss Scott is she's got that twinkle in her eye.
Probably drug-induced. Spent most of her life in bloody rehab.
ko: 아마 약물 때문일 거야. 인생의 대부분을 재활원에서 보냈어.

en: But whatever. She's so clearly up for it.
ko: 뭐, 어쨌든 그녀는 분명히 원하고 있어.

en: I mean, you see, most girls, they're all like stay-away-chum, but Anna, she is absolutely
ko: 대부분의 여자들은 다들, 가까이 오지 마라, 친구야.

en: gagging for it. You know, in over 50% of languages,
the word for actress is the same as the word for prostitute.
And Anna is your definitive actress.
Someone really filthy, you can just flip over and star again.
ko: 정말 더러운 사람, 그냥 뒤집어서 다시 시작할 수 있어.

en: Right, that's it. Sorry. There's really no point in it.
Obviously. Sorry to disturb you guys, but...
Can I help? Well, yeah. I wish I hadn't overheard your conversation, but I did.
ko: 음, 당신들의 대화를 엿듣지 않았으면 좋았겠지만,
